name: Jersey Meadow Golf Club
address: 8502 Rio Grande St, Jersey Village, TX 77040
about: Jersey Meadow Golf Club is an 18-hole golf facility located in Jersey Village, Texas. The venue offers a traditional on-course experience alongside modern amenities including two simulator bays, a virtual putting green, and a driving range. With a pro shop and an on-site restaurant and bar, Jersey Meadow provides a comprehensive golf environment suitable for players of all skill levels. The club emphasizes a community-focused atmosphere, offering various membership options, leagues, and instructional programs for both adults and juniors.
why_golfers_like_it: Combines traditional on-course play with advanced simulator technology
Offers a full-service experience with dining, pro shop, and practice facilities
Provides a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all skill levels and ages
Features dedicated simulator bays for off-course practice and play

food_and_drink.notes: Full restaurant service with dedicated menu, including brunch and snack bar options.
Bar service available with cocktails and other beverages.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you are expected to bring your own clubs for simulator play.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has an on-site restaurant and bar called Little Meadow, which serves food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator round take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole simulator round is not explicitly stated, but it typically depends on the simulator software and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Jersey Meadow offers junior membership programs, a Jr. Golf School, and family-friendly amenities, making it suitable for kids.
